title: Decision
description: Human-authoritative governance decision. Authority: BINDING. Requires human auditor_id. Only humans may produce binding outcomes (Invariant 1).

artifact_id.description: Unique decision identifier. Only DEC_ prefix IDs may authorize Actions (EB-1 enforcement).

auditor_id.description: Human auditor identifier. Required. Enforces Invariant 1 (Authority). Rejection, not warning, on absence.

decision_text.description: Decision narrative authored by the human auditor.

observation_refs.description: References to Observation artifacts. At least one required. Enforces Invariant 3 (Evidence-First).

hypothesis_refs.description: Optional references to Hypothesis artifacts reviewed prior to decision. Hypotheses are advisory, not required.

policy_reference.description: Policy identifier cited by the decision.
